EmailTemplate.description: Email to RM for change in reference name.
EmailTemplate.name: Email to RM for reference name
EmailTemplate.subject: New Reference
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Opportunity.RW_RM_Name__c},
Your customer named {!Opportunity.Name} has referred a new Lead named {!Opportunity.RW_Given_Reference_Name__c}.
Thanks, Runwal Homes
